'''Simons''' was one of [[General/Legends|General]] [[Garm Bel Iblis/Legends|Garm Bel Iblis]]' [[Helm officer/Legends|helmsmen]] onboard the ''[[Errant Venture/Legends|Errant Venture]]'' during the [[Battle of Yaga Minor (Galactic Civil War)|Battle of Yaga Minor]].

==Appearances==
